docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-13-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FRANK G BLUNDO JR. HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
